title: navarretia miwukensis
intro: Navarretia miwukensis, also known as Miwok navarretia or mountain fairy candle, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Navarretia miwukensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Navarretia miwukensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
